message:
feat(abi): port 12 _nss_files_endXX NSS plugin stubs (bd-fsknj)

Twelve GLIBC_PRIVATE-versioned NSS plugin "end iteration" entries
from libc.so.6 for the `files` source (the loader behind /etc/passwd,
/etc/group, /etc/hosts, etc. when nsswitch.conf chooses files):

  - _nss_files_endaliasent / _endetherent / _endgrent / _endhostent /
    _endnetent / _endnetgrent / _endprotoent / _endpwent / _endrpcent /
    _endservent / _endsgent / _endspent

Each takes no args and returns enum nss_status; we return
NSS_STATUS_SUCCESS (= 1, "I successfully ended the iteration") since
we never started one. The NSS dispatch layer accepts that and moves
on. Generated via a small `nss_files_end_stub!` macro for compactness.

Tests: 1 abi test driving every endXX entry through the same macro to
assert NSS_STATUS_SUCCESS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
